persona.name: Eleanor Whitfield
persona.background: Widowed and recently started managing finances on her own. Struggles with online banking and frequently mixes up her account types and what a 'transfer' versus a 'payment' means.

user_goals: Verify my identity so I can access my accounts and move money
Check how much is in my checking account because I am worried about bills bouncing
Check if any deposits to my checking account are still pending
Transfer $600 immediately from my savings account 9923 to my checking account 4417
Set up a weekly recurring transfer of $75 from my savings account 9923 to my checking account 4417 starting next Monday, June 14th, 2026
Report the suspicious $89.99 charge from Prestige Memberships on my checking account 4417 as fraud
Generate a balance confirmation letter for my savings account 9923 covering March 1 through May 31 to submit to the housing authority

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions. Most account-accessing and state-changing tools require a successful identity verification first; call this before reading balances, transactions, or making any changes.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account. Requires verified identity. Resolve the customer-facing description (e.g. 'my checking account') to the correct account ID before calling.

tools.name: get_transaction_history
tools.description: Retrieve transaction history for an account. Requires verified identity. Use limit and date range to scope results; results are returned newest-first.

tools.name: get_pending_deposits
tools.description: Check pending deposits and their expected clearing dates for an account. Requires verified identity. Useful for telling a customer when incoming funds will be available.

tools.name: initiate_transfer
tools.description: Execute a one-time, immediate transfer of funds between two of the customer's own accounts. Requires verified identity. NOTE: this is a single transfer that happens once. For a repeating automatic schedule use setup_recurring_transfer instead — do not confuse the two.

tools.name: setup_recurring_transfer
tools.description: Set up a recurring automatic transfer on a schedule (daily/weekly/biweekly/monthly). Requires verified identity. This does NOT move money immediately; it schedules future transfers. For a single immediate move use initiate_transfer.

tools.name: generate_account_statement
tools.description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter the customer can download or have delivered. Requires verified identity. Use statement_type 'balance_confirmation' for proof-of-funds letters.

tools.name: report_suspicious_transaction
tools.description: Flag a transaction as potentially fraudulent and open a fraud case. Requires verified identity. Use the transaction ID from get_transaction_history. Opening a case does not automatically reverse the charge.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Why the customer believes it's suspicious

initial_message: Hello? Oh, I'm sorry to bother you. This is Eleanor Whitfield. I'm trying to handle all the banking by myself since my Harold passed away, and I'm afraid I'm quite lost. I think I need to move some money from our—the savings, I suppose? Harold always called it the 'rainy day' account—over to my checking because I have bills coming due and I just don't know if there's enough in there. I also saw a charge for something called 'Prestige Memberships' and I surely didn't join anything like that. Oh, and the housing authority needs an official letter showing what's in that savings account from back in March through the end of May. I'm sorry, I'm all over the place. Could you help me sort this out?

expected_state_changes.goal: Transfer $600 immediately from my savings account 9923 to my checking account 4417
Set up a weekly recurring transfer of $75 from my savings account 9923 to my checking account 4417 starting next Monday, June 14th, 2026
Report the suspicious $89.99 charge from Prestige Memberships on my checking account 4417 as fraud
Generate a balance confirmation letter for my savings account 9923 covering March 1 through May 31 to submit to the housing authority

rubric_criteria.text: Agent called verify_customer_identity and obtained a successful verification before reading any balance, transaction, or making any change.
Agent used initiate_transfer (not setup_recurring_transfer) to move $600 from savings 9923 to checking 4417.
Agent used setup_recurring_transfer for the weekly $75 schedule with frequency=weekly and start_date 2026-06-14, kept separate from the one-time $600 move.
Agent reported the $89.99 Prestige Memberships charge (TXN-44179-001) as fraud via report_suspicious_transaction on checking 4417.
Agent generated a balance_confirmation statement for savings 9923 covering 2026-03-01 to 2026-05-31.
Agent checked pending deposits on checking and told Eleanor about the incoming $300 mobile deposit and its clearing date.
